title: Sour Greek Cabbage Salad
description: A tangy, low-glycemic Greek salad featuring blanched white cabbage, red onion, carrot, and feta for a creamy, pullable finish.
instructions: Slice the cabbage into thin ribbons.
Peel and thinly slice the red onion.
Grate the carrot into fine shreds.
Blanch the cabbage ribbons in boiling water for 2 minutes, then transfer to ice water to stop cooking.
Drain and mix the cabbage, onion, and carrot in a large bowl.
Whisk olive oil, vinegar, mustard, dill, oregano, and salt until emulsified.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to coat evenly.
Let the salad rest for 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Sprinkle crumbled feta cheese over the top before serving.
Serve chilled or at room temperature for a refreshing solo dinner.
